headline:
Borrow what you need.
Return it when you’re done.
lede: A shelf of shared gear and well-worn field guides, kept in the neighborhood. Take a pack for the weekend, a guidebook for the season — leave it better than you found it.
form_description: Tell me what books you are looking for and what cross streets you live on. Once approved, I'll set up access and send it your way.
form_success: Request sent — I'll be in touch.
form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
